_comment: Template for a single MCP command manifest entry. Copy this object into the 'commands' array in mcp-server/manifest/commands.json AND web/src/data/commands.json.
_instructions: 1. Replace 'my_domain_action' with your snake_case command name.
2. Replace 'category_name' with an existing category from the valid list.
3. Write a description that tells the AI WHAT it does, not just restates the name.
Include: parameter effects, side effects, prerequisites.
5. List all parameters with accurate types, descriptions, and ranges.
6. Add 'required' array listing mandatory parameter names.
7. Delete this '_comment' and '_instructions' block before committing.
name: my_domain_action
description: One-sentence summary of what this command does. Include: what it affects, valid ranges for numeric params (e.g. 0.0-1.0), whether it triggers events, and any prerequisites (e.g. 'requires entity to have a mesh component').

entityId.description: Target entity identifier from the scene graph. Obtain via list_entities or from a selection event.

mode.description: How to apply the change: 'add' accumulates on top of the current value, 'replace' overwrites it.

enabled.description: Whether to enable (true) or disable (false) the feature.
